titleStmt.title: SII 37.387: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 387. (A.R. No. B 34 of 1941-42.) Pōrumāmiḷḷa, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Pillar in the Veraṇḍah in front of the Lakshmīkāntasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1470 (current.), Kīlaka, Mārgaśira, ba. 6, corresponding to 1548 A.D., November 21, Wednesday.

It registers the grant of exemption by Nandēla Timmarāju, son of Narasiṅgarāju and grandson of Avubhaḷarāju from tolls for all foodstuffs such as rice, spices etc., taken by the temple bulls from the Udaygiri-sīma and the Pākanāṭi-sīma to the Sakali-sīma, for offerings to god Ahōbalēśvara of Vēdādri-Garuḍādri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
naśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1470 Agunēṭi kīla
ka saṁvatsara mā¨rgasira ba 6 lu . śrīma
drājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivarāya ma
hārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁ
du sāmrājyaṁ sēstuṁḍagānu
dēvadēvōttamulaIna catu¨rbhu
vanādhīśvarulayni Akhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhmaṁ
ḍanāyakulayni vēdādri garuḍādri nivāsula

yni śrī Ahōbalēśvarulku Ātrēya gō
trōdbhavulayni Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ yajuśā
khādhyāyulaina naṁddēla Avubhaḷrājuṁgā
ri pautṛṁḍu naraśiṁggarāju kumāruṁḍḍu
tiṁmmarājuṁgāru yicni dha¨rmmaśāsanakrama
mu svāmi nagari koḍe yeddulu svāmi nagarki
pākanāṁṭisīmanu vudayagirisīmanuṁḍi A
mṛtapaḷaku rasadravyālu biyyaṁ parimala dravyā
lu vuppu yēmi goṁppōyinānu Aṁddulku suṁ
kha sūtrālu magamusaḥ sarvamānyaṁ sēstimi . saka
liśīmalō guṁḍḍānu koṁppōyni Aṁdulakellānu
sarvamānyaṁ sēstimi . Ani yicni dharmaśāsanamu .
Digital edition of SII 37.387 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
